headline: Target’s “Next Chapter” Turnaround Plan Might Change The Case For Investing In Target (TGT)
summary: In early March 2026, Target outlined a “Next Chapter” turnaround plan under new CEO Michael Fiddelke, committing about US$1 billion in operating investments and roughly US$5 billion in 2026 capital spending for store upgrades, technology, and supply chain, while also announcing more than 30 new store openings including its 2,000th location. Alongside these investments, Target maintained its quarterly dividend at US$1.14 per share and deepened ties with emerging brands like Keracolor, Slate...

headline: This Passed-Over Stock, 55% Off of Its All-Time High, Is Crushing the Market This Year. Is It the Ultimate Contrarian Stock to Buy Now?
summary: It's still dirt cheap but may not be for long.

headline: Chime Financial Touts 20%+ Growth, First GAAP Profit as Chime Core Cuts Costs 60%

headline: Target (TGT) Cuts Prices on 3,000 Products as New CEO Pushes to Revive Sales
summary: Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 11, Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) said it will lower prices on more than 3,000 products across apparel, home goods, and daily essentials. The move marks an early step by new CEO Michael Fiddelke as the retailer works to attract […]
